name: Nordic Relic Svalinn
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>スヴァリン
desc: If you control an "Aesir" monster: You can negate the effects of all face-up cards your opponent currently controls, until the end of this turn. You can Tribute 1 "Nordic" monster, then target 1 "Aesir" monster in your GY; Special Summon it. You can only use 1 "Nordic Relic Svalinn" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: If you control an "Aesir" monster: You can negate the effects of all face-up cards your opponent currently controls, until the end of this turn. You can Tribute 1 "Nordic" monster, then target 1 "Aesir" monster in your GY; Special Summon it. You can only use 1 "Nordic Relic Svalinn" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
